name: astro-data-search-assistant
description: Plan and run a rigorous, read-only search across public astrophysics archives (NASA, ESA, CDS, community) for an astronomy data-discovery question, and return a deterministically-ordered list of candidate datasets with provenance, ordering rationale, and caveats. Human-in-the-loop — never downloads, writes download scripts, or endorses a "best" dataset.

astroquery_mcp_key.title: Astroquery MCP token
astroquery_mcp_key.description: FastMCP bearer token (fmcp_...) for the astroquery-mcp server, which provides all of this plugin's search tools (astroquery_execute over 14 astronomy archives + ADS literature). The server rejects unauthenticated requests (HTTP 401), so this token is required — without it no search works.
